title: rhododendron × sanderi
intro: Rhododendron × sanderi, also known as the Sander's rhododendron or Chinese rhododendron, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Ericaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain, and improving respiratory conditions. Rhododendron × sanderi is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be used as a raw material for the production of medicinal extracts and supplements.
